case_id: 0001 (corresponds to case ID 1 in VitalDB API)

pi_items.verified_value: VitalDB Case 0001 - Real public dataset from Seoul National University Hospital, published on PhysioNet.org and vitaldb.net containing 6,388 surgical cases with 196 intraoperative monitoring parameters
pi_items.source: VitalDB API (https://api.vitaldb.net/cases, https://api.vitaldb.net/trks) confirms case ID 1 exists with clinical metadata and 76 tracks. PhysioNet repository at https://physionet.org/content/vitaldb/1.0.0/ contains actual vital files.

pi_items.verified_value: All three tracks exist in VitalDB case 0001: Solar8000/ART_MBP (track ID: 5e68ffda69677a28dca49f361e088903239fd1cf), Primus/ETCO2 (track ID: 9b4169af3e550b1eaec8e3aa516b626b77340d82), BIS/BIS (track ID: fd869e25ba82a66cc95b38ed47110bf4f14bb368)
pi_items.source: VitalDB Track API response: curl https://api.vitaldb.net/trks | gunzip shows all tracks for case 1

pi_items.verified_value: Correct - the local data file is named 0001.vital (file path: examples/vital_recorder_windows_env/data/0001.vital), gzip compressed with original filename 0001.vital
pi_items.source: File inspection: file command and hexdump of local 0001.vital confirms gzip header with embedded filename
Windows path - cannot verify in Linux environment, but follows standard artifact directory naming convention

additional_verified_facts: Vital Recorder v1.16.6 MSI installer is available at https://vitaldb.net/getvr.php?type=msi&ver=1.16.6 (7.2 MB, HTTP 200)
Vital Recorder v1.16.4 fallback installer available at https://vitaldb.net/getvr.php?type=msi&ver=1.16.4 (7.2 MB, HTTP 200)
VitalDB main website (https://vitaldb.net/) and dataset page are accessible
Local 0001.vital file is gzip-compressed and 21 MB, containing medical waveform data from multiple devices
VitalDB case 1 (0001) is from a 77-year-old male surgical patient undergoing colorectal surgery with general anesthesia

Case 0001 contains 76 total tracks from multiple monitoring devices: BIS monitor (8 tracks), Primus anesthesia machine (40 tracks), Solar8000 patient monitor (20+ tracks), and SNUADC analog converter (4 tracks)
All three required physiological parameters are standard intraoperative monitoring metrics: ART_MBP (mean arterial blood pressure), ETCO2 (end-tidal CO2), BIS (bispectral index for anesthesia depth)
privileged_info_summary: VitalDB Case 0001 is a real surgical case from Seoul National University Hospital's public VitalDB dataset (published on PhysioNet). The case contains all three required physiological parameter tracks: Solar8000/ART_MBP, Primus/ETCO2, and BIS/BIS. The local 0001.vital data file (21 MB) is a gzip-compressed Vital Recorder case file matching the real public data source. Vital Recorder versions 1.16.6 and 1.16.4 are available for download from vitaldb.net.
